client_id.description: Specifies the Application ID of the Azure AD application associated with the service principal.

display_name.description: Specifies the display name for the service principal, typically matching the name of the associated application.

object_id.description: Unique identifier of the Azure Active Directory object to associate with the service principal.

timeouts.description: Defines custom timeout settings for operations such as creation, update, or deletion of the service principal.
